meta.title: mutav. Rent insurance, the way it should work
meta.description: MUTAV. Brazilian rental guarantee protocol. When tenants miss payments, settlement is automatic. No paperwork, no queue.
meta.ogTitle: mutav. Rent insurance, the way it should work
meta.ogDescription: Programmable rental guarantee. Automated settlement, verifiable record.

hero.subhead: The on-chain rental guarantee fund. Opening real assets with real yield to investors through onchain guarantee funds.

gap.h2:
YOU ARE CORRELATED TO BTC
AND CALLING IT A STRATEGY

items.label: Correlation
items.headline: BTC drops 40%. Your "diversified" portfolio drops together
items.body: The whole portfolio moves together. You are not diversified. You are leveraged to one narrative. Bull market required.

items.label: No accountability
items.headline: The protocol behind your yield has no legal identity
items.body: Anonymous team. No regulator. When it breaks, there is no recourse.

items.label: No access
items.headline: Real assets are locked
items.body: Brazil's billion-dollar rental guarantee market pays consistent fees. No on-chain vehicle existed. Until now.

items.headline: Yield from rent.
items.body: MUTAV yield comes from rental fees and Brazilian treasury. When crypto corrects, your position holds. Magic.

items.headline: Legal structure.
items.body: MUTAV built the infrastructure that opens this market. The full operation runs within a regulated framework.

items.headline: On-chain for the 1st time.
items.body: Tokenized Brazil's rental market. Three token classes. Any qualified investor. Self-custodial. The vehicle that didn't exist until now.

market.h2: A billion-dollar market that's never been open to you.
market.featuredBody:
The rental guarantee segment
that crypto has never accessed.

tiers.intro: The Mutav Treasury Fund issues three token classes with sequential loss absorption (waterfall). NAV appreciates daily from rental guarantee fees and Brazilian treasury yield.

items.body: Last in the waterfall. Designed for capital preservation with consistent yield from tokenized Brazilian treasury plus guarantee fees.
Protected by MTVH. You absorb losses only if MTVH reaches a critical default threshold. Balanced exposure for investors who want meaningful yield without first-loss risk.
You absorb defaults first. In exchange: maximum exposure to rental-guarantee market yield.
items.access: MUTAV itself holds MTVH. Skin-in-the-game by design.

midCta.body: Pilot launching 2026. Limited spots in the first cohort.

vision.kicker: the path. no dates, no promises
vision.h2: We start with the guarantee. The whole rental layer comes after.

phases.label: Now
phases.title: Rental guarantee
phases.body: Automatic payout to the landlord on default. Programmatic settlement, public record.

phases.label: Next
phases.title: Verifiable system
phases.body: Every payment, default, and settlement logged on-chain. Auditable by anyone.

phases.label: After
phases.title: MUTAV: programmable exposure
phases.body: Investors access the rental-market spread with verifiable NAV and an on-chain settlement log.

phases.label: Horizon
phases.title: Programmable payments and funds
phases.body: Optimizing what most blocks the rental market: transactions, payments, fund custody. Where it makes sense.

bifurcation.h2Line2: We'll let you know when we're ready.

cards.label: Agency / Landlord
cards.body: You rent, manage, or own property. You want a guarantee that pays.
cards.aria: Jump to the landlord and agency waitlist

cards.label: Investor
cards.body: You operate on Stellar or DeFi. You want real yield with verifiable collateral.

items: When the tenant is late, you get paid.
No form. No queue. No call to support.
The money lands in the registered account. Automatically.
imobiliaria.dignity: We'll let you know when we're ready. We won't spam.
imobiliaria.consent: By joining the list, you consent to the use of your email to receive updates about MUTAV. You can leave any time. Just reply to any email with "unsubscribe".

items: Rental-guarantee spread. Not a generic pool.

team.eyebrow: +30 years in the rental real estate market
team.subtitle: Named founders. We ship in public.
team.teamCardBody: Code open on GitHub. Architecture verifiable. No anonymous team.

founders.name: Matheus Draau
founders.bio: 5+ years building brands at the intersection of technology, brand, and market. Multidisciplinary team coordination and blockchain product development. Co-founder of No Bloco. Direct exposure to the Southern Brazil real estate network gave him the first look at the rental guarantee gap.

founders.name: Julia H. Buratto
founders.bio: Founder of jubs.studio. Launched Chainless in 2023, from zero to 30,000 users, still running. Works at the intersection of systems architecture, UX, and onchain infrastructure, with experience in fintech and Web3 products.

items.a: Defaults hit MTVH first. Only if MTVH reaches a critical default threshold does MTVM absorb losses. MTVL is last in the waterfall.
Tokens are self-custodial. Redemption via on-chain queue. 2.5% weekly cap, 0.25% exit fee.

items.q: How is the guarantee fee collected?
items.a: Partner agencies register rental contracts on our platform to be covered by the guarantee. MUTAV's infrastructure handles the entire path that fee takes — from contract origination at the agency level all the way into the fund.

success.imobiliaria: Received. You're on the landlord list. We'll let you know when we're ready.
success.investidor: Received. You're on the investor list. Follow the build at github.com/mutav-finance.

INVALID.imobiliaria: Invalid email. Check the format and try again.

DUPLICATE.imobiliaria: That email is already on the list. We'll be in touch.
DUPLICATE.investidor: Already on the list. Check the history on GitHub.

RATE_LIMITED.imobiliaria: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
RATE_LIMITED.investidor: Rate-limited. Try in a few minutes.
